Now Hiring – Eluru / West Godavari

Medical Representative Jobs in Eluru & West Godavari

Crasenim Pharma is hiring Medical Representatives and commission-based field sales professionals in Eluru, Bhimavaram, Tanuku, and across West Godavari district. One of AP's most well-connected pharma corridors, West Godavari offers steady prescription volumes and strong growth potential.

📍 Eluru, Bhimavaram, Tanuku 💼 Full-Time + Commission Roles 🏆 1–4 Years Experience Preferred
💬 Apply via WhatsApp All Openings
Territory

West Godavari Pharma Market Overview

Eluru is the district headquarters of West Godavari — a well-connected city on the NH-16 corridor, midway between Vijayawada and Rajahmundry. The district spans some of AP's most agriculturally prosperous territory, with a large, health-aware population and consistent demand for prescription medicines across antibiotic, cardiac, and gastric categories.

Bhimavaram is arguably the most commercially active pharma sub-market in West Godavari. Tanuku, Narsapur, Jangareddygudem, and Palacole round out the key sub-territories that a Crasenim MR may cover depending on assignment.

Key Markets – West Godavari

Eluru (HQ), Bhimavaram, Tanuku, Narsapur, Jangareddygudem, Palacole, Kovvur, Tadepalligudem

  • Eluru — district HQ with strong GP and nursing home network
  • Bhimavaram — one of West Godavari's busiest pharma markets
  • Consistent antibiotic and gastric prescription demand across the district
  • Well-connected by rail and road to Vijayawada and Rajahmundry
  • Commission-based roles available with no investment required
  • Full training and product support from Crasenim Pharma HQ
Job Openings

Pharma Vacancies in Eluru & West Godavari

Medical Representative – Eluru / West Godavari
📍 Eluru, West Godavari💼 Full-Time🕒 1–3 Years
Now Hiring
  • Promote Crasenim Pharma products to GPs, specialists, and pharmacies across Eluru
  • Cover Eluru city and assigned sub-territory (Bhimavaram, Tanuku, or Tadepalligudem)
  • Competitive salary + travel allowance + monthly performance incentives
  • Regular product knowledge training and detailing material support
Commission-Based MR – Bhimavaram / Tanuku
📍 Bhimavaram / Tanuku / Narsapur💼 Commission🕒 Any Experience
Now Hiring
  • Earn monthly commission on prescriptions generated for Crasenim Pharma in West Godavari
  • Cover Bhimavaram, Tanuku, Narsapur, or Jangareddygudem sub-territories
  • No investment needed — immediate start for candidates with local pharma networks
  • Monthly incentive bonuses for consistent target achievement
FAQs

Pharma Jobs in Eluru – FAQ

Are there MR jobs in Bhimavaram as well as Eluru?
Yes. We have openings across West Godavari including Eluru city, Bhimavaram, Tanuku, and Narsapur. Depending on your experience and preferred sub-territory, we can tailor the assignment.
What products would I be promoting in West Godavari?
MRs in West Godavari promote our full portfolio: Amoxsenim-CV 625, Pansenim-DSR, Telsenim-40, Metsenim-G, Crasenim-LC, and Crasenim Bar — all WHO GMP certified and manufactured by AKUMS DRUGS.
How do I apply for a pharma MR job in Eluru?
WhatsApp your details to +91 99890 74806 or submit the form on our Careers page.
